name: Castr Live Streaming API
what_it_does: Live streaming and video hosting platform with REST API — enabling simultaneous multistreaming to 30+ platforms, live stream recording and transcoding, video-on-demand hosting, paywall and subscriptions for live content, real-time analytics, and embedded player customization.
use_cases: Managing live stream destinations and RTMP stream keys programmatically via API
Querying live stream analytics (viewers, bandwidth, geo) for reporting dashboards
Automating VOD upload and transcode pipeline after live stream recordings
Managing paywall and subscription access for premium live content via API
Scheduling and configuring multistream broadcasts for content calendars
not_for: Browser-based studio production without hardware encoder (use StreamYard)
Enterprise broadcast with SRT or specialized protocol requirements
Social-only video hosting without live streaming needs
best_when: A content creator, media company, or OTT platform wants multistreaming, VOD hosting, and paywall features with good API access and competitive pricing.
avoid_when: You need a browser-based production studio (use StreamYard), separate audio track recording (use Riverside), or enterprise live event production infrastructure.

auth.notes: API key from Castr account. Bearer token auth. Account-scoped access. Webhook for stream status events. No OAuth2 or fine-grained scopes. API key in Authorization header.

pricing.notes: Singapore-based company. Founded 2016. Competitive pricing. Simultaneous streaming to 30+ platforms. Built-in paywall (Castr Pay) and VOD subscriptions. Embedded adaptive player. CDN delivery. Strong in Asian markets and global creator economy. RTMP, SRT, and WebRTC ingest supported.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for streams, destinations, analytics, and VOD. Bearer token auth. Good developer documentation. Stream key management is primary API use case. Destinations must be configured before multistreaming. Paywall management via API available on higher plans. Webhook for stream events.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Stream reads idempotent. Analytics reads idempotent by date range. VOD reads idempotent. Stream key rotation creates new keys — invalidates previous.
known_agent_gotchas: RTMP stream keys are highly sensitive — rotate after streams and store securely
Multistream destinations require OAuth connection to each platform (done in UI)
Paywall API requires premium plan — verify plan before implementing
Stream analytics have processing delay — not available in real-time via API
Singapore-based infrastructure — latency considerations for US/EU primary audiences

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Multi-region data residency. Bearer token auth. RTMP stream keys give broadcast access — secure storage critical. Paywall content requires access token validation. Singapore company with global CDN.
